title: AV:Link | Micro HDMI Cable Type D To Standard HDMI | Supports 3D & 4K
features: Note: Micro HDMI Cable will NOT work with most android smart phone e.g Samsung Galaxy S3 / S4 / S5 which only has micro USB port. Please make sure your device is equipped with a micro HDMI port before purchasing.

Micro HDMI to HDMI cable helps you to stream audio and video from a tablet through the micro HDMI port to your HDTV or projectors with HDMI port. Enjoy games on large-screen display or share high-definition video and digital sound together with your family and friends.

Smoothly vision experience without flicker, equipped with triple-layer shielding protecting from interference, display a clear and natural video world in front of you. Support 3D technology, Audio Return Channel, 1440p and 1080p Full HD resolution, transfer both high definition video and digital sound, place yourself in superb home theater and surround in rich sound.

Universal compatible, fit for GoPro HERO 6, Asus Transformer Prime, Lenovo Yoga 710 / MIIX 320, Motorola Xoom, Acer A700 / Aspire Switch 12 S, Coby Kyros MID1026 , Sony DSC-WX350 / HX50, Kodak Max 990, Casio TRYX, Olympus Camera , Blackberry PlayBook, DELL Latitude 7000 and more Micro HDMI equipped device.
description: Product Description AV:Link | Micro HDMI Cable Type D To Standard HDMI | Supports 3D & HD Transfer both high-definition video and digital audio from your compatible smart device, camera, laptop and much more to your home theater. Gold plated connectors Oxygen free copper & Full Shielding, much more stable Micro HDMI cable than other brands. The gold-plated connector resists corrosion, ensures maximum conductivity and durability. 3D, 4K & Ethernet compatible COMPATIBLE (incomplete list) Camera: Sony AX33, A7, A7S, A6000, Nikon CoolPix P900, S33 Panasonic Lumix FZ300, Lumix GH4, Lumix G7 Action Camera: GoPro HERO3, HERO3 +, HERO4 Silver, HERO4 Black, HERO5 Black, HERO6 Black SJCAM SJ4000, SJ4000 WIFI, SJ5000, SJ5000 WIFI, SJ M10 Series, Xiaomi Yi Camera Tablet: Lenovo MIIX 310, Lenovo IdeaTab S6000H Google Nexus 10; Acer Iconia A500; BlackBerry Playbook Chuwi Hibook Pro, H10 Pro, H10 Plus, Hi12 tablet, Hi10 Laptop: Lenovo Yoga 2, Yoga 2 Pro, Yoga 3 Pro, Yoga 710, Yoga 700 Asus Zenbook UX305, Asus Transformer T100, T100 Chi, T200TA, T300 Chi, TF300, Asus Chromebook Flip C100PA Microsoft Surface RT, Surface 2 Smartphone: Sony Xperia Pro, Xperia S, Ericsson Xperia Arc, Ericsson Xperia Arc S Motorola DROID 3, Razr, Razr Maxx, Atrix, Triumph LG Optimus 2X, Optimus 3D, Thrill 4G BlackBerry Z10, Z30, Q10 HTC Evo 4G Notes This cable will NOT work with Samsung Galaxy Phones, Or Samsung Tablets with Micro USB Connection. Please check if your device is equipped with micro HDMI port before purchase. Box Contains Avlink HDMI Plug To HDMI Micro Plug 1.0M
